content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative un-supervised refinement workflow as a base framework to instantiate multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine can draw on a distinct inconsistent solving perspective from self-reflection theory to generate deeper, more robust feedback. This creates a layered improvement loop that avoids the stagnation that can occur when a single LLM perspective repeats the same blind spots across Self-Refine iterations.
